content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Reverse Bits". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/reverse-bits/
constraints: The input is a 32-bit unsigned integer.
content.inputFormat: The function takes an unsigned 32-bit integer as input.
content.outputFormat: The function returns the integer with its bits reversed.

solution.approach: Use bitwise operations to reverse the bits of the input integer.
